name: Spicy Chinese Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 Scant tablespoons Chekiang vinegar or white rice vinegar
1 tsp Chili oil or cayenne pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Mix gently until well combined and the sugar is fully dissolved.
3. Transfer to a serving bowl and allow to stand until ready to use.
NOTE: Chenkiang vinegar, also known as Chekang vinegar or Mokiang vinegar, is a thick, flavorful vinegar commonly used in Chinese cooking. It can be found at most Asian markets.
